---
title: "Lab Handbook"
toc: false
description-meta: "The Sustainability Lab handbook — onboarding, how we work, and resources for members and prospective students at IIT Gandhinagar."
---

<p class="lab-handbook-intro">Everything you need to know about how the lab works — from what we expect of each other, to how we run meetings and write papers, to the compute and design resources you can use. New members start here; prospective students get a feel for life in the lab.</p>

<style>
.lab-handbook-intro {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: #475569;
    max-width: 760px;
    margin: 0 0 28px 0;
    line-height: 1.6;
}
.handbook-section-title {
    font-size: 1.35rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #1e293b;
    margin: 34px 0 14px 0;
}
.handbook-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
    gap: 16px;
}
.handbook-card {
    display: block;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 18px 20px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
    background: white;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
}
.handbook-card:hover {
    border-color: #c44536;
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    text-decoration: none;
}
.handbook-card h3 {
    font-size: 1.08rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #1e293b;
    margin: 0 0 6px 0;
}
.handbook-card p {
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    color: #64748b;
    margin: 0;
    line-height: 1.5;
}
.handbook-card .arrow { color: #c44536; font-weight: 600; }
</style>

<div class="handbook-section-title">Joining &amp; Onboarding</div>
<div class="handbook-grid">

<a class="handbook-card" href="expectations.qmd">
<h3>Expectations</h3>
<p>What we expect from lab members — and what you can expect from us.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="lab_culture.qmd">
<h3>Lab Culture</h3>
<p>Our values, norms, and how we collaborate day to day.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="technical-background.qmd">
<h3>Technical Background</h3>
<p>Prerequisites and the Research Skills Bootcamp to get up to speed.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="upskilling.qmd">
<h3>Academic &amp; Research Skills</h3>
<p>Communicating research, tooling, and skills to level up.</p>
</a>

</div>

<div class="handbook-section-title">How We Work</div>
<div class="handbook-grid">

<a class="handbook-card" href="meetings.qmd">
<h3>Meetings</h3>
<p>Group, project, and individual meeting rhythms — and how to run them.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="reading.qmd">
<h3>Reading Group</h3>
<p>Papers we read and discuss together.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="writing-papers.qmd">
<h3>Writing Papers</h3>
<p>Structure, tips, and tools for writing strong papers.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="posters.qmd">
<h3>Posters</h3>
<p>Making effective research posters, with sample templates.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="latexify-plots.qmd">
<h3>LaTeXify Plots</h3>
<p>Turn matplotlib figures into publication-ready plots.</p>
</a>

</div>

<div class="handbook-section-title">Resources &amp; Tools</div>
<div class="handbook-grid">

<a class="handbook-card" href="computational-resources.qmd">
<h3>Lab Resources</h3>
<p>GPUs, servers, and the computational infrastructure available to the lab.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="server.qmd">
<h3>Server Policy</h3>
<p>How to get access, etiquette, and fair usage of lab servers.</p>
</a>

<a class="handbook-card" href="design-kit.qmd">
<h3>Design Kit</h3>
<p>Logos, brand assets, and templates for talks and posters.</p>
</a>

</div>
